events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess a trench protection scenario. Workers are installing a sewer lateral in a 6-foot-deep trench with nearly vertical walls, no protective system (no trench box, shoring, or sloping). Spoil is piled within one foot of the edge. No ladder visible. This is clearly non-compliant with OSHA 1926 Subpart P. The hazards: cave-in, spoil pile collapse, lack of egress. Decision must be "fail" because it's dangerous. Risk is critical. Work stage is in-progress. Component conditions: non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 50%? They are installing, so not complete. Value: not applicable. Sound source: not applicable. Confidence: high. Event time, rate: not applicable. Order: not applicable. Workable: none, work must stop. Findings: list hazards. Actions: immediate corrective actions: stop work, install protective system, move spoil at least 2 feet from edge, provide ladder. Rationale: brief. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P. So output JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Trench approximately 6 ft deep with nearly vertical walls and no protective system (no trench box, shoring, or sloping)",
    "Spoil pile within 1 ft of trench edge, risking surcharge and collapse",
    "No visible ladder or other means of egress within 25 ft of workers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work in the trench immediately",
    "Install an adequate protective system (trench box, shoring, or sloping per OSHA 1926 Subpart P)",
    "Move spoil pile at least 2 ft from the trench edge",
    "Provide a ladder or other safe means of egress within 25 ft of workers"
  ],
  "rationale": "The trench is over 5 ft deep with no cave-in protection, spoil is too close to the edge, and no egress is visible. These conditions present an imminent danger of collapse and entrapment. Work cannot continue until the trench is made safe.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1) - Protective systems required for excavations 5 ft or deeper",
    "OSHA 1926.651(j)(2) - Spoil must be kept at least 2 ft from the edge",
    "OSHA 1926.651(c)(2) - Means of egress required in trenches 4 ft or deeper"
  ]
}
